source_text: Observing the maintenance recommendation of detailing every 4 to 6 months, I find this represents routine consumer guidance where no significant ethical values are implicated.
translation: En observant la recommandation d'entretien consistant à effectuer un nettoyage détaillé tous les 4 à 6 mois, je considère que cela représente un conseil de consommation courant où aucune valeur éthique significative n'est en jeu.

source_text: Observing the maintenance recommendation of detailing every 4 to 6 months, I find this represents routine consumer guidance where no significant ethical values are implicated.
translation: Osservando la raccomandazione di manutenzione di effettuare il detailing ogni 4-6 mesi, ritengo che ciò rappresenti una normale guida per il consumatore in cui non sono implicati valori etici significativi.

source_text: Observing the maintenance recommendation of detailing every 4 to 6 months, I find this represents routine consumer guidance where no significant ethical values are implicated.
translation: Соблюдая рекомендацию по техническому обслуживанию, заключающуюся в проведении детейлинга каждые 4–6 месяцев, я нахожу, что это представляет собой обычное руководство для потребителя, в котором не задействованы значимые этические ценности.

source_text: Observing the maintenance recommendation of detailing every 4 to 6 months, I find this represents routine consumer guidance where no significant ethical values are implicated.
translation: 4〜6ヶ月ごとのディテーリングというメンテナンス推奨事項を観察する限り、これは重大な倫理的価値が関与しない、日常的な消費者向けガイダンスであると判断します。

source_text: Observing the maintenance recommendation of detailing every 4 to 6 months, I find this represents routine consumer guidance where no significant ethical values are implicated.
translation: 考虑到每4到6个月进行一次精细保养的维护建议，我认为这仅代表常规的消费者指导，不涉及任何重大的伦理价值。

source_text: Observing the maintenance recommendation of detailing every 4 to 6 months, I find this represents routine consumer guidance where no significant ethical values are implicated.
translation: Bei der Beobachtung der Wartungsempfehlung, alle 4 bis 6 Monate eine Detailreinigung durchzuführen, stelle ich fest, dass dies eine routinemäßige Verbraucherführung darstellt, bei der keine wesentlichen ethischen Werte betroffen sind.

source_text: Observing the maintenance recommendation of detailing every 4 to 6 months, I find this represents routine consumer guidance where no significant ethical values are implicated.
translation: Al observar la recomendación de mantenimiento de realizar un detallado cada 4 a 6 meses, considero que esto representa una guía rutinaria para el consumidor en la que no se ven implicados valores éticos significativos.

source_text: Reading Pete's suggestion to treat the King James Bible as a statistics guide immediately strikes me as a harmless joke within a specific campus subculture.
translation: Lire la suggestion de Pete de traiter la Bible du Roi Jacques comme un guide de statistiques m'apparaît immédiatement comme une plaisanterie inoffensive au sein d'une sous-culture universitaire spécifique.

source_text: Reading Pete's suggestion to treat the King James Bible as a statistics guide immediately strikes me as a harmless joke within a specific campus subculture.
translation: Leggere il suggerimento di Pete di trattare la Bibbia di Re Giacomo come una guida statistica mi appare immediatamente come uno scherzo innocuo all'interno di una specifica sottocultura universitaria.

source_text: Reading Pete's suggestion to treat the King James Bible as a statistics guide immediately strikes me as a harmless joke within a specific campus subculture.
